code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    let n = tokens.len()
    while i < n
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        match string.parse_int(t)
        when Some(v)
          nums = insert_sorted(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    let m = nums.len()
    while j < m
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
